effective_condition: merge of the execution-unlock pull request
authorized_scope: run frozen trace replay and bounded-state verification
generate outputs required by the frozen output schema
prohibited_scope: change Vocabulary Semantics Baseline 1.1 during execution
weaken frozen gates to force completion
claim universal sufficiency, primitive-only sufficiency, necessity, minimality, independence, superiority, FAR proof, or universal reasoning structure
review_status: authorization becomes valid only through merge of this reviewed pull request
